who: accountants in law firms processing 5–15 quarterly tax filings
offer: For accountants in law firms processing 5–15 quarterly tax filings, inaccurate tax summaries cause compliance issues. We provide tax summary preparation instead of manual preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate tax summaries leading to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accountants seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on tax workflows
DM outreach to accountants with demo video
Share insights in community forums for accountants
try_it: Let users manually enter tax data for a few items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Allow CSV import for existing data
